task_description: Complete overhaul of Shogun's Ascent board game to implement the real game rules. Replace 6 simplified clans with 8 real clans, implement proper figure types (Daimyo/Bushi/Shinto/Fortress), Temples/Kami system, season cards from all 3 seasons plus Kami Unbound, War Province tokens, War Tactics bidding, Hostages, Ronin, proper mandate resolution, battle mechanics, and Winter scoring.

verification.summary: tsc -b compiles with zero errors. vite build produces output (271KB JS, 13KB CSS). No tests to run (project has no test framework). Three review iterations completed - v3 approved with two non-blocking minor issues documented.
